$schema_note: The game-loop telemetry seam: the metric keys the balance simulation (bot games) must emit per round so the balance-analyst can derive real balance and check the shapes game-architect committed. Emitted at DESIGN_COMPLETE. game-loop init validates these keys against its rubric.

watch_items_from_game_architect.I-020_balance_asserted: crown-stand rates .70-.99 and axis magnitudes rest on napkin shape-checks; derive from archetype_crown_stand_rate + axis_* + dominated_archetype_pairs + power_band_width
watch_items_from_game_architect.I-014_glad_load_centrality: glad-load ~54% of card-power flagged central-but-bounded; watch glad_load_power_share + acquisition_source_shares does not flatten build diversity
watch_items_from_game_architect.I-006_gleam_centrality: watch gleam_centrality_share does not make all builds gleam-first
watch_items_from_game_architect.I-022_untold_tempo: untold_pressure_vs_size_ratio ~1.0 mid-run, untold_crown_delivery <= size at crown
watch_items_from_game_architect.gleaner_pale_route: gleaners flagged top-of-band + boss-affine; watch archetype_win_rate[gleaners] vs risk
watch_items_from_game_architect.crown_stand_spread: target within the .70-.99 band; no archetype locked out or runaway
